name: cathodic-report
documentation:
# cathodic-report

In `cathodic-report`, we define `types` as the input of the total module.

The users could use `cahtodic-report` implement report generation.

## Development

`pdm install`

## Install

`pdm add <package>`

## Documentation

No documentation here.

## Dependencies

- git@github.com:cathodic-app/mk2pdf.git

modules.name: cathodic_report.report

不涉及 disk 读写，直接写入文件
save_fig: plt.savefig(img_stream, format='png')
